top_signals.title: Takaichi Cabinet’s approval rate almost flat at 59.4%
top_signals.summary: By political party, Takaichi's ruling Liberal Democratic Party remained the most popular party, backed by 27.8% of all respondents, up 2.1 points.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
